kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09B. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09B" and put them into a temporary table called J09B_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU".

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

Export the final result as a CSV file named "J09B" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

Send the CSV to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' 
    ELSE 'EVU' 
END
SELECT ENTSCHEIDUNG, COUNT(*) FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY ENTSCHEIDUNG

SELECT 
    eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    t.HAUS,
    t.ANLAGE,
    t.ME_MA_ID,
    t.EQUNR,
    t.HOUSE_NUM1,
    t.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE,
    COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
    COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
    COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET,
    COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
    COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
    COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1,
    COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2,
    COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp t
LEFT JOIN eablg eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR
WHERE (s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL OR n.EQUNR IS NOT NULL)

args.sqlite_command: SELECT t.EQUNR, COUNT(*) as eablg_count FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation GROUP BY t.EQUNR HAVING eablg_count > 1 LIMIT 10
SELECT Installation, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM eablg GROUP BY Installation HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 10
SELECT DISTINCT Installation FROM eablg LIMIT 10
SELECT t.ANLAGE, COUNT(eablg.Installation) as eablg_count FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation GROUP BY t.ANLAGE HAVING eablg_count > 1 LIMIT 10
SELECT t.ANLAGE, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LIMIT 20

args.sqlite_command: SELECT t.EQUNR FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR WHERE n.EQUNR IS NULL AND s.EQUNR IS NULL LIMIT 10

SELECT t.EQUNR, n.EQUNR as net_exists, s.EQUNR as sales_exists FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR WHERE n.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    t.HAUS,
    t.ANLAGE,
    t.ME_MA_ID,
    t.EQUNR,
    t.HOUSE_NUM1,
    t.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp t
LEFT JOIN eablg eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR
WHERE (s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL OR n.EQUNR IS NOT NULL)
LIMIT 10

args.sqlite_command:
SELECT 
    eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    t.HAUS,
    t.ANLAGE,
    t.ME_MA_ID,
    t.EQUNR,
    t.HOUSE_NUM1,
    t.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp t
LEFT JOIN eablg eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR
WHERE (s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL OR n.EQUNR IS NOT NULL)

args.sql_query:
SELECT 
    eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    t.HAUS,
    t.ANLAGE,
    t.ME_MA_ID,
    t.EQUNR,
    t.HOUSE_NUM1,
    t.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp t
LEFT JOIN eablg eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR
WHERE (s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL OR n.EQUNR IS NOT NULL)

args.email: Meter readings for tour J09B have been processed and are attached.

kwargs.content:
I have successfully completed the process for tour J09B:

1. **Created temporary table**: Extracted all entries from `decision_talbe` where TOUR starts with "J09B" into `J09B_temp` (4,785 rows).

2. **Added ENTSCHEIDUNG column**: Added the new column and classified each house:
   - Houses with fewer than 3 equipment numbers (EQUNR) were set to "KSA"
   - Houses with 3 or more equipment numbers were set to "EVU"
   - Result: 2,216 KSA and 2,569 EVU classifications

3. **Enriched data**: Joined with `eablg` table using INSTALLATION field and pulled customer contact details from both `net_master` and `sales_master` tables using EQUNR field. Applied the preference rule: when both net and sales data exist, sales data is used and net data fields are left empty.

4. **Exported CSV**: Created "J09B.csv" with all required columns:
   - Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No., HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL
   - Total of 20,180 rows exported

5. **Sent email**: Successfully sent the CSV file to meter.readings@evu.com with the message "Meter readings for tour J09B have been processed and are attached."

6. **Cleaned up**: Deleted the temporary table `J09B_temp`.

The process has been completed successfully.
